expected_effect: Fix PowerShell syntax errors by replacing bash heredoc with PowerShell-compatible file write command and updating validation commands to use semicolons
rationale: The current prompt template uses bash-style heredoc (cat > ... << STATUSEOF) which fails in PowerShell with ParserError. Also validation commands use && instead of ; for command chaining. This causes cycle failures on Windows.

strategy: Extract structured signals from logs and user instructions
Select an existing Gene by signals match (no improvisation)
Estimate blast radius (files, lines) before editing
Apply smallest reversible patch - replace && with ; for PowerShell
Replace bash heredoc with PowerShell-compatible file write
Validate using declared validation steps; rollback on failure
Solidify knowledge: append EvolutionEvent, update Gene/Capsule store

summary: Fixed PowerShell syntax errors: replaced bash heredoc with PowerShell-compatible command and updated validation commands to use semicolons instead of &&
